items.title: Hamaki ‘Haga Mestakhabeya’ 10 Years Concert | Live
description: A concert video capturing Hamaki performing “Nefsi Aba’a Ganbo” as part of the 10 Years concert celebration.
Built around live energy, crowd atmosphere, and performance-driven pacing, the piece showcases key moments from the stage in a polished, event-ready format.
Created as a highlight asset suitable for digital publishing and concert promotion.

items.title: La Casa de Papel | Promo (Netflix)
description: A social-style promo created for Netflix, featuring Arabic-speaking fans sharing their excitement and connection to La Casa de Papel.
Shot across Arab locations with styling inspired by the series, the video captures a shared community moment around the show and the culture of fandom.
Designed as an audience-first piece to spark conversation and amplify regional engagement.
